message:
fix(demo): more Unicode-safe truncation and Clippy fixes

Extends Unicode-safe string handling to remaining components:

notes_modal.rs:
- Add #[expect(clippy::cast_possible_truncation)] for width cast
- Inline format args in string templates
- Remove unused variable in test

shell_action.rs:
- Simplify run_pager_command: remove unreachable if branch
  (both branches returned Ok(()), just return Ok(()) directly)
- Inline format args in panic! and format! calls

test_support.rs (ScenarioRecorder and E2ERunner):
- Use .chars().count() and .chars().take(n) for paste preview
- Use Unicode-safe truncation in truncate_view() helper
- Prevents panics on multi-byte characters in test output

These complete the sweep of string slicing operations that could
panic on Unicode input or trigger Clippy warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
